tasks.label: Android: Start Emulator
tasks.detail: Boots the recepti_test AVD. Wait for it to finish booting before installing.

tasks.label: Android: Ensure Emulator Ready
tasks.detail: Starts the recepti_test AVD only if no device/emulator is already connected, then waits for it to finish booting before returning.

tasks.label: Android: Build & Install Debug
tasks.detail: Bundles app/ into the nodejs-project assets, then builds and installs the debug APK on whatever device/emulator adb currently sees.

tasks.label: Android: Launch App
tasks.detail: Starts MainActivity on the connected device/emulator (app must already be installed).

tasks.label: Android: Run (Build, Install & Launch)
tasks.detail: One-shot: starts the emulator if needed and waits for it to boot, then builds, installs, and launches.

tasks.label: Android: Logcat
tasks.detail: Streams logs from the app: MainActivity's debug tag plus the embedded Node process (console.log from server.js/centralSync.js shows up as NODEJS-MOBILE:I). On the emulator, NODEJS-MOBILE also carries some unrelated software-GL renderer noise at warning/error level -- harmless, ignore it.

tasks.label: Android: Uninstall App
tasks.detail: Removes the app (and its local SQLite data) from the device/emulator -- use after a schema change, since the SQLite adapter only ever runs CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS and won't migrate an existing install.
